top_patterns.description: Open with a question or prompt, then share a personal thought or reflection.
example_quotes: Who won?
Maybe it is my subconscious telling me to play more ?

top_patterns.description: Share upcoming news or events with enthusiasm.
top_patterns.structure_template: Exciting news about [event/product]! Can't wait to share.
example_quotes: exciting news about the next One for One product coming soon!
I'll be making the announcement at @sxsw.

top_patterns.description: Describe a scene or moment with vivid detail.
example_quotes: Beautiful sunrise hitting the peak in Davos.
Testing new @toms searcher boots. And a baby hammock.

top_patterns.description: Share a personal activity or experience casually.
example_quotes: My omelet just reminded me of my childhood.
My next trick

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Engage audience with curiosity, then share personal thought
example_quotes: Who won?
Maybe it is my subconscious telling me to play more ?

archetypal_structures.formula: Exciting news about [event/product]! Can't wait to share.
example_quotes: exciting news about the next One for One product coming soon!
I'll be making the announcement at @sxsw.
Beautiful sunrise hitting the peak in Davos.
Testing new @toms searcher boots. And a baby hammock.
My omelet just reminded me of my childhood.
My next trick

language_habits.line_break_style: Occasional line breaks for emphasis, often after a thought or question.

example_quotes: Who won?
Anyone watch the segment?
My omelet just reminded me of my childhood.
Exactly how I feel
First TOMS shoe in Haiti!
Adopted canyon from rescue center.

anti_patterns: Overly promotional language without personal touch

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice is casual, personal, and engaging, with frequent questions and vivid scene descriptions.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift from era_a more promotional and formal to era_c more personal and conversational.
